{{CargoRelic
|name=Venus de Milo
|class_id=21614
|rank=SS
|affct=ART
|birthday=08-19
|source=
|description=On Aug 19, 1820 AD, this statue was unearthed on Milos in the Aegean Sea.<br>When the statue was unearthed, both of her arms were missing. Luckily, her head and her body remained intact. Her cloth covered the waist, but you can still sneak a peek of her toes. She has a sassy feminine form. Many believe the sculpture represents the pinnacle of ancient Greek art.
[Basic Info]
Date of Creation: Hellenistic Period
Material: Marble
Type: Relief Art
Sculptor: Alexandros
Height: 2.04 meters
Collected by: Louvre Museum, France
|fame=74
|art=102
|fth=57
|civ=53
|tech=61
|ss1=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +90<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +9<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +3
|ss2=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +180<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +18<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss3=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +270<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +27<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +9
|ss4=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +450<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +45<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +15
|ss5=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +630<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +63<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +21
|ss6=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +900<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +90<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30
|ss7=Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HP +900<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop RUSH +90<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30<br>Per 60 Angel Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +30 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Quary skill III.png|50px]]Place in Quarry: Stone Output +30%
|skill2=[[File:Hellas skill III.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, DMG +30%
|skill3=[[File:Hellas skill III.png|50px]]Place in Hellenic Museum: In Hellas, 2x INTEL Drops +15%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=Venus' Arm|reward={{RewardIconWithLink|Glue, +100|orange}}
|3name=Hexa-Arm Venus|3rec=6.95M|3atk=67227|3defense=44691|3hp=1406211|3weak=12512
|4name=Tetra-Arm Venus|4rec=14.71M|4atk=100509|4defense=66817|4hp=2831908|4weak=16779
|5name=Di-Arm Venus|5rec=35.64M|5atk=141460|5defense=94040|5hp=5457460|5weak=19021
|Arec=60.18M|Aatk=193384|Adefense=128559|Ahp=9660976|Aweak=21877
}}}}
